Attach organism GO mappings to a GO graph

Source: R/attach_org.R
attach_org.Rd

Retrieves GO-to-gene mappings from an OrgDb and attaches them to a GO or GOSubgraph object for downstream filtering and export.

The mapping is restricted to GO IDs present in go. No graph restriction is performed here; use filter_mapped() for that.

Usage

attach_org(go, OrgDb, keytype = "ENTREZID")

Arguments

go

A GO or GOSubgraph object.

OrgDb

An OrgDb object (e.g. org.EcK12.eg.db).

keytype

character(1) Gene identifier type to use from the OrgDb. Default is "ENTREZID".

Value

The same object as go, with an attached mapping table.
